name: Performable Feedback Tunnel
description: A feedback tunnel that ships with live controls: knobs for feedback decay, zoom, spin and blur are exposed on the container so you can perform it, animate the knobs with an LFO, or snapshot looks as presets.

nodes.name: noise1
nodes.comment: Seed texture that feeds the loop (mono=1 keeps it grayscale; the param is 'mono', not 'monochrome')

nodes.name: comp1
nodes.comment: Combines seed + fed-back frame. 'maximum' stays bounded under feedback gain (the default multiply collapses to black).

nodes.name: transform1
nodes.comment: Zoom + rotate each frame to create the tunnel motion (sx/sy are the scale params, not scalex/scaley)

nodes.name: level1
nodes.comment: Decay / feedback gain. levelTOP multiplies RGB via brightness1 (it has no 'gain' parameter).

parameters.name: feedback_target
parameters.description: feedbackTOP samples the loop output (level1). Value resolves to the created node path.

preview_description: An endless rotating tunnel of evolving colored noise that folds into its own center, with live knobs for feedback, zoom, spin and blur.
